Name: bit-calculator
Description: Gate-level 4-bit arithmetic provider for natural-number-arithmetic. Add/sub/mul/div computed by logic-gate netlists; nothing arithmetic is stored, only input bits. Federated provider theorem imported by effortless-math as four flagship results.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktopostgres
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate Postgres schema and seed data for the gate calculator.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: execute
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Load the generated SQL into erb_bit_calculator (init-db.sh points at that DB). Runs on every build.
